title: Heritage Cheese Knife Set - Driftwood
description: Crafted for slow boards and lingering gatherings, this hand-finished cheese knife set brings timeless character to the table. Each piece is made from 18/08 stainless steel and carefully sanded by hand, paired with smooth ABS handles secured by brass rivets for a heritage-inspired touch. Designed to handle everything from soft, creamy rounds to firm aged wedges, each knife offers a balanced weight and comfortable grip. Beautiful enough to leave out on the board, sturdy enough for everyday use. Each set is a set of 3 and includes: Cleaver: Ideal for cutting semi-hard to hard cheeses such as cheddar, gruyere, and fontina. 8" x 1.5". Cheese Knife: A great multi-purpose tool with a narrow blade for soft cheeses and a pronged end for plating and serving. 8.75" x 0.75". Spreader: The dull blade makes it perfect for spreading creamy, spreadable cheeses onto crackers or bread. 6.5" x 0.75". Dishwasher Safe

Thoughtful details like a solid brass showerhead, dual handles for easy pouring, and subtle imperfections in the finish speak to its handcrafted character. Whether you’re watering indoor plants or tending to your garden, it’s a piece that brings beauty and purpose to simple, daily rituals. title: Agrarian Crocks
description: Available in three sizes, our Agrarian Crocks are perfect for any kitchen need. Whether you’re using the smaller sizes to store utensils or the 2-gallon crock as a stylish ice bucket that fits multiple bottles of wine, these crocks are as functional as they are beautiful. Choose from cool gray or warm earthy brown exteriors, paired with a deep charcoal interior, and enjoy the natural flecking of iron deposits that add organic texture. Hand-stamped with the volume inside the arched handle, these crocks blend rustic charm with practical versatility, making them an essential addition to any space. The Agrarian Crock Collection beautifully complements our traditional stoneware. Mix and match the variety of sizes and colors within the collection. Due to the organic nature of the materials and the artisanal process, each piece is unique and may exhibit natural color variations. These subtle differences are a testament to the individuality of each item and add to its charm and character. title: Cirrus Supersoft Organic Cotton Throw
description: To create our softest, most inviting throw, we begin with pure organic cotton. Then we enhance its natural texture and performance by gently brushing these thick yarns until we reach the perfect balance of weight, warmth, and softness. We used subtle variations in weaving techniques to bring vertical bands of texture to life, while three thick stripes of white add a bold, horizontal contrast to cap off each end.

title: Organic Latex Molded Pillow
description: Soft and resilient, our Molded Organic Latex Pillow offers medium-firm support that’s perfect for back and side sleepers. The organic latex insert gives you even comfort across the pillow. Your head sinks in comfortably, but with less give than a shredded latex, down, or poly-filled pillow. Thanks to its natural spring, the latex will hold its shape for many years. Our Molded Organic Latex Pillow is made of pure, GOLS-certified organic Dunlop latex for exceptional resilience and durability. Harvested by tapping trees, natural latex rubber is a renewable, biodegradable foam. Naturally breathable and resistant to mold, mildew, and dust mites, it’s an ideal material for those with mold or dust sensitivities.

title: Precita Organic Duvet Cover - Renewed
description: Deep shades of indigo give this duvet an oceanic quality, speaking to the water that surrounds our coastlines. Inspired by the rich textures of vintage mudcloth, each piece is woven with thick and thin yarns, creating a ¼” fringed texture throughout. Stone washing accentuates subtle highs and lows of the fabric, leading to slight color variations in each duvet, making every piece unique. Backed with plain weave cotton. Color may lighten over time. Fastens with internal ties and coconut shell buttons Shams sold individually 100% organic cotton grown + woven in India GOTS Certified Made in a factory that recycles 90%* of its wastewater Reactive Dyed with Stone Wash: Color will have a variation, just like indigo dyed items 210 GSM front, 162 GSM back (~186 GSM average)

title: Conserve Organic Bowl Covers + Paperless Towels Set
description: A simple, reusable alternative to plastic wrap, this set of three reversible bowl covers eases your transition into a zero waste kitchen. Crafted from our Crinkled Percale™ fabric, each cover is striped on one side and solid on the other, with an encased elastic hem around the bottom that stretches to fit a variety of bowls and dishes. Each set of three includes one small, one medium, and one large bowl cover. It takes 17 trees and 20,000 gallons of water to make one ton of paper towels. Save resources and reduce waste in your kitchen (and beyond) with this multi-use replacement for paper towels. Modeled after our Organic Waffle Kitchen Towels, each set of eight paperless towels comes with contrast binding in two colors—making it easy to color code which towels you use where. After the first wash, the organic cotton waffle weave will shrink up and crinkle, offering more surface area per square inch to soak up moisture.
display_title: Conserve Organic Bowl Covers + Paperless Towels Set
clean_description: A simple, reusable alternative to plastic wrap, this set of three reversible bowl covers eases your transition into a zero waste kitchen. Each set of three includes one small, one medium, and one large bowl cover. It takes 17 trees and 20,000 gallons of water to make one ton of paper towels. Save resources and reduce waste in your kitchen (and beyond) with this multi-use replacement for paper towels. description: A soft, richly textured throw woven from undyed organic cotton and natural linen, designed to highlight the beauty of raw fibers. Undyed organic cotton body featuring wide natural linen stripes at each end. Pebbled texture on the face crafted with roving thick and thin yarns. Pair with the matching Pampas Organic Decorative Pillow Cover.
